name: Native Tag & Online Lyrics Plugin
author: Devil_1210
description: Extracts lyrics from native audio metadata tags (USLT, SYLT, LYRICS) and fetches time-synced lyrics from online providers (LRCLIB, lyrics.ovh).

http.reason: Fetch lyrics from online lyrics services (LRCLIB, lyrics.ovh)

library.reason: Access local audio file tags and sidecar lyrics

providers.title: Lyrics Providers Priority
providers.description: Comma-separated list of providers to query in order (e.g. tag,lrclib,ovh).
